excluded.reason: LazyForEach is declarative control-flow, not scored ui_block component
NullBuilder default binding reference is not a ui_block call site
ECMAScript Math is not frozen platform API
ECMAScript Math is not frozen platform API
JSON runtime helper not frozen platform API
JSON runtime helper not frozen platform API
project helper method not SDK platform API
getContext()?.resourceManager.getStringByNameSync is a property access on the getContext() return value, not a call through the imported resourceManager root binding
getContext()?.resourceManager?.getStringSync is a property access on the getContext() return value, not a call through the imported resourceManager root binding

uncertainties.question: Only the bare root identifier resourceManager at line 4126 is the binding from import resourceManager from @ohos.resourceManager. That module is not in frozen module_prefixes, and resourceManager.getSystemResourceManager(...) is an unresolved SDK receiver call, so the entire APIs field must remain null. Lines 2969 and 2993 use getContext()?.resourceManager as a property of the getContext() return value; those cannot be attributed to the same-named import root for API ownership.
